description: Build the dark-themed promo dashboard page with left side navigation and editable tables. The page is a standalone route at app/promo-dashboard/page.tsx with its own layout that does NOT use the existing Navbar. It has a dark navy/purple theme inspired by Seller Analytics dashboards.
steps: Create app/promo-dashboard/layout.tsx - a custom layout for this route that does NOT render the Navbar from components/Navbar.tsx. It should wrap children in a minimal html/body with the Inter font and globals.css imported. This prevents the default light Navbar from appearing on this dark page.
Create app/promo-dashboard/page.tsx as a 'use client' component with the following structure:

1. HEADER AREA (top bar): Dark background (#16213e or similar). Contains: KALOVA brand text on left, then dropdowns for Brand (default 'KALOVA'), Bulan (month selector Jan-Dec), Tahun (year selector 2024-2026). Style dropdowns with dark backgrounds, light text, subtle borders.

2. LEFT SIDEBAR NAVIGATION: Fixed-width sidebar (~200px) with dark background slightly lighter than main (#1a1a2e). Contains vertical menu items: 'Tab Promo', 'Banner', 'Toko', 'IG Story', 'Host Live', 'Ads CPAS', 'Timeline'. Active item highlighted with purple/violet background (#7c3aed or similar). Items have hover effect. Use useState to track activeTab.
3. MAIN CONTENT AREA (right of sidebar): Shows an editable table based on which tab is selected. Dark background for the table area.
4. TABLE DEFINITIONS - Each tab shows a table with these columns:

- Tab Promo: id produk, nama produk, kategori, hpp, harga jual, admin fee, shipping fee, promo xtra, fee/pesanan, campaign fee, promosi fee, marketing fee, ads spending, affiliate commis, operating cost, margin, npm, approve
- IG Story: file flyer igs, link produk, jadwal post
- Host Live: file banner, etalase, promo

5. EDITABLE TABLE COMPONENT: Each cell contains an <input> element so users can type text. The table uses dark styling: dark header row, alternating slightly different dark row backgrounds, subtle border (border-gray-700), white/light-gray text. Input fields should be transparent background with white text, showing content inline.
6. ADD ROW BUTTON: Below each table, a '+ Tambah Baris' button that appends a new empty row to the current tab's data.

7. STATE MANAGEMENT: Use useState to store table data as a Record<string, string[][]> where key is the tab name and value is a 2D array of strings (rows x columns). Initialize with 3 empty rows per tab. Each cell change updates state.

8. DARK THEME COLORS: Background: #0f0f23 or #1a1a2e. Sidebar: #16213e. Header: #0d1b2a. Active tab: #7c3aed (purple). Table header: #1e293b. Table rows: alternating #0f172a and #1e293b. Text: white and gray-300. Borders: gray-700. Button: purple-600 with hover purple-700.
acceptance_criteria: Navigating to /promo-dashboard shows the dark-themed page with header, sidebar, and table
Clicking different sidebar menu items switches the displayed table
Each table cell is editable (typing text into input fields works)
Clicking '+ Tambah Baris' adds a new empty row to the current table
The page does NOT show the default light Navbar
`npm run build` passes with no TypeScript errors
verification: Run `npm run build` in /projects/sandbox/Workflow-Campaign-Promo and confirm exit code 0
findings: Page created at app/promo-dashboard/page.tsx using fixed inset-0 z-50 overlay approach to cover the root layout Navbar. Build passes cleanly. Route renders at /promo-dashboard.
